raw_consumer_statement:
I requested a chargeback for a purchase on my Citibank simplicity card regarding a merchant who had been dishonest with me on XX/XX/year>. 
I was told by the company they would take care of all import fees. They did not ; when shipment arrived I refused delivery and had XXXX return to sender. 
XXXX provided information to Citibank who took the merchant 's side and " closed '' the dispute. 

On XX/XX/year> they requested information including the date I returned the merchandise. I provided all information to them ( I have documentation ) on XX/XX/XXXX, including the tracking numbers of the returned, unopened merchandise. 

Citibank said the merchant refused to offer a return, even when merchandise arrived in their hometown. So, Citibank " closed '' the dispute again. 

Each letter Citibank issued to me had conflicting and contradictory reasons as to why they would not do a charge back. 

I filed an appeal on XX/XX/year> appealing the decision, mailing it certified mail within the deadline. I phoned Citibank multiple times and they received the appeal letter and were working on it. 

They responded on XX/XX/year> saying since I was in possession of the merchandise they are denying my appeal?!? I RETURNED THE MERCHANDISE. I HAVE PROOF OF RETURN FROM UPS. 

So Citibank is committing fraud by lying and saying I still have the merchandise. I would appreciate a CHARGE BACK for this transaction!!! 



I certified mailed an appeal letter to Citibank.
